title: vangueria lasiantha
intro: Vangueria lasiantha, also known as the 'Yellow Milkwood', is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Vangueria lasiantha include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with the leaves and roots used to make various herbal remedies.
